ext.description: Live preview of an MkDocs site inside VS Code, with one-click mkdocs serve, file-to-page sync, and admonition snippets.
cmd.openToSide.title: MkDocs: Open Live Preview to the Side
cmd.open.title: MkDocs: Open Live Preview
cmd.start.title: MkDocs: Start Server
cmd.stop.title: MkDocs: Stop Server
cmd.restart.title: MkDocs: Restart Server
config.title: MkDocs Live Preview
config.host.desc: Host the mkdocs dev server binds to.
config.port.desc: Port the mkdocs dev server listens on.
config.mkdocsPath.desc: Path to the mkdocs executable. Leave empty to auto-detect the workspace .venv, then fall back to 'mkdocs' on PATH.
config.configFile.desc: MkDocs config file, relative to the workspace root.
config.autoSync.desc: Follow the active editor: navigate the preview to the page of the current Markdown file.
config.readyTimeout.desc: Maximum time (in seconds) to wait for the MkDocs server to be ready after a start. Raise it on large sites with heavy themes where the first build is slow.
